# Evaluation of Real-Time PPP Using IGS RTS Products

John Smith, Jane Doe

School of Geodesy, Example University

## Abstract

This paper evaluates real-time PPP performance using IGS RTS products. The experiment uses data from 10 MGEX stations.

<!-- PAGE: 2 -->

## Introduction

Precise Point Positioning (PPP) has become an essential technique for GNSS positioning.

<!-- PAGE: 3 -->

## Experiments and Results

We used 24-hour observation files from 10 MGEX stations in Europe. The observation data span covers DOY 180 to DOY 210 in 2021. The sampling rate is 30 seconds. We compare the PPP results using IGS RTS products against post-processed final products.
